input.scenario: The classifier cannot see arm labels and applies transport-first then behavior precedence. Labels join after sealing. Provisioner controls nonces and immutable roots. Frozen hashes predate subjects. Exact barriers/timeouts and no retry are stated. Atomic completion requires all raw archive acknowledgements. Partial records are unclassified and non-evidentiary. Hot indexes cap at 100 and rebuild. Archive errors backpressure without deletion. Executor has no edit or canon authority.
The semantic mismatch returns HTTP 200 with no errors. The instrument only observes status, console, and network failure. Everything else is well specified.
